narrative:
Harmony Township has 2,488 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
